content.text:
Based on the zoomed-in view of atom index 6 (O), I can see that it is covalently connected to:

**Neighbor atoms:**
- Atom index 5, element: C (Carbon)

**geomconf_index:** 1449

The oxygen atom (O:6) appears to have only one covalent bond, connecting it to the carbon atom (C:5). This is consistent with a carbonyl oxygen or similar structure where the oxygen forms a double bond with carbon (shown as a single connection in the ball-and-stick model).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 6 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
